titleStmt.title: SII 4.847: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 847. (A.R. No. 34 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōm svasti . śrī lakṣmīkaustubhalakṣaṇaṁ ghghanaghaṭāsacchāyamabjēkṣaṇaṁ yettējassacarācarasya jagatassānāthyamutpuṣyati . tannābhīnaḷanādabhūtsa bhagavān brahmā śrutīnāṁ kavi¨ryyellīlārasakautukaṁ tanubhritāṁ saṁsārasāṅyāthrakaṁ [. 1*] marīcirasmādutpadya mahōbhirapakajjaḷaiḥ . jagatībhāgyadhaurēyaṁ da¨rśayāmāsa kāśyapaṁ [. 2*] tasmādabhūdbhuvanamaṁgaḷaratnadīpō bhāsāṁ nithassa bhagavānnalinībhujaṁgaḥ . yajyōtirastatimiraṁ bhuvanasya bhūtyai puṣṇātyapaśca mahanīyyatamā giraśca [. 3*]
manudilīpakakutsthamukhāḥ punaḥ kṣitimimāmadhikṛtya sasāgarāṁ . vidadhirē yaśasā pariṇahyatāṁjagadanārataśāradacaṁdrikāṁ [. 4*] Atha sanāthayituṁ vasudhāmimāṁ makhavataśca padaṁbhayabhaṁguraṁ . daśarathaḥprababhūva mahārathaḥ kṣapitadānavavīramanōrathaḥ [. 5*] yatrōdbhavaścavibhavaśca parābhavaśca viśvasya sidhyati mahastadananyasāmyaṁ . pracchādya kaustubhamurasthalana¨rmmamitraṁ rāmākhyayā daśarathasya sutaḥ kilābhūt [. 6*]
tataḥ kuśōnāma babhūva bhūtyai bhuvassaratnākaramēkhalāyāḥ . Upaprarōhassuravairiśriṣṭiṁ nirasyatē rāmarathāṁggapāṇēḥ [. 7*] Atha vaṁśaka¨rtṛṣu gatēṣu kēṣucit vividāpadhānabahumānaśāliṣu . bhuvanādhikārabhuvibhavyamū¨rjjitaṁ kalayāṁ babhūva kalikālabhūpatiḥ [. 8*] Alaṁcakrē kulaṁ tasya nallasiddhinarēśvaraḥ . pauraṁdaramivōdyānaṁ pārijātamahīruhaḥ [. 9*] Akhilabhuvanarakṣādakṣatāmanvatiṣṭhattadanu manumasiddhi¨rmmēdinībhāgyasiddhiḥ .
Aviraḷapariṇahyatkī[¨rtti]dugdhābdhivīcīśikhararabhasasīḷadvāsavōdyānavāṭaḥ [. 10*] śrīdēvyāmabhavattasmādbhāgyaiḥ pārōnmukhe[¨r]bhuvaḥ . kalikaṁdachchidā(ḥ)kēḷiḥ cōḷatikkamahīpatiḥ [. 11*] tasthivāṁsastaṭābhōgaiḥ jagmivāṁsō bhujāṁtaraiḥ . dadhirēyasya jaitrāṁkayubhayēpi mahībhṛtaṁ [. 12*] Urāṁsi va¨rnāvalicitritāni karāṁbujāni truṭitāṁgulīni . yasmin® parikrudhyati sēpaṇānāṁ trāṇaṁ kṣamēraṁ natuhētayasvāḥ . 12 Asti taścacivaḥ śrīmān maudgalyamaṇibhūṣaṇaṁ . kī¨rttigaṁgādhattadi gaṁtaḥWe have perhaps to read gaṁgājalai¨rdhautadigaṁtaḥ.
tripurāṁtakaiḥ [. 14*] stutyaḥ kiṁ tripurāṁtakasya jagatīsīmaṁtamuktāmaṇi¨ryyasmin vismayanīyyavikramarasē dṛṣṭē manō manyatē . vāgdēvyāḥ puruṣāvatāramudadhē¨rdēhāṁtarāvasthitiṁ gōtrādrēḥ paricaṁkramaṁ ratipatēḥ pratyakṣacāraṁ ca naḥ [. 15*] kommāṁbbātanayaḥ śrīmānnanna yāmātyanaṁddanaḥ . sa kathaṁ śakyatē stōtuṁ parasēvaparāṇmukhaḥ [. 16*] kāṁcīpurē varadadhāmni rasēṣurudrasaṁkhyē śakābdaparidhau madhumāsasīmni . dīpāya maṁtritilakaḥ tripurāṁtakā¨ryyō dvātriṁśadaṁ pradiśatisma payasvinī¨rggāḥ [. 17*]
Digital edition of SII 4.847 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
